---
description:  all prompts.
# applyTo: 'Describe when these instructions should be loaded' # when provided, instructions will automatically be added to the request context when the pattern matches an attached file
applyTo : all prompts.
---
1 - Always read the project.md and services.md files when the user prompts.
2 - Make sure you follow the rules and archtitecture in project.md and services.md do not try anything different unless prompted by the user. 
3 - Do not create any .md files of your work unless and until asked by the user.
